title: Figure 6 from: Johnston PR, Park D, Smith ME, Mujic AB, May TW (2021) Brahmaculus gen. nov. (Leotiomycetes, Chlorociboriaceae). MycoKeys 80: 19-43. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.80.64435

description: Figure 6 Brahmaculus packhamiae (PDD 117311) A, B dried apothecia C detail of head of dried apothecium D hymenial surface of rehydrated apothecium, showing multiple separate apothecial cups E squash mount showing excipular cells and hairs in KOH + Melzer's reagent F ascoma in vertical section G paraphyses, asci, and ascospores H ascospores. Scale bars: 1 mm (A–C); 0.1 mm (D); 10 µm (E–H).
